text: The app freezes when I try to create a listing with multiple photos.
Writing titles and descriptions for every item takes forever.
Search visibility feels random and my items get almost no views.
I love how easy shipping labels are, but bulk listing still needs work.
The latest update keeps logging me out while I am listing products.
I need better sold comps so I know how to price vintage electronics.
Fees make it hard to understand whether a sale is actually profitable.
The listing flow is good for one item but painful for a large inventory.
